languages.text:
{n}Полковник вскидывает бровь и смотрит на вас с мрачным весельем.{/n}
"Мы готовимся еще рекрутами, но вам можно попробовать дать трупную вытяжку. Будет очень дурно. Даже если вы Богу-Императору душу не отдадите, тело все равно может не приспособиться".

traits.locale_text:
{n}Полковник вскидывает бровь и смотрит на вас с мрачным весельем.{/n}
"Мы готовимся еще рекрутами, но вам можно попробовать дать трупную вытяжку. Будет очень дурно. Даже если вы Богу-Императору душу не отдадите, тело все равно может не приспособиться".

languages.text: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."
languages.original_text:
{n}Полковник вскидывает бровь и смотрит на вас с мрачным весельем.{/n}
"Мы готовимся еще рекрутами, но вам можно попробовать дать трупную вытяжку. Будет очень дурно. Даже если вы Богу-Императору душу не отдадите, тело все равно может не приспособиться".

traits.locale_text:
{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with dark amusement.{/n}
"We prepare while still recruits, but you may try the rot extract. It will be most foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow in surprise and looks at you with dark amusement.{/n}
"You can try. But if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt. And then things will be really bad for you."

{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with dark amusement.{/n}
"We prepare while still recruits, but you may try the rot extract. It will be most foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

languages.text: 大佐は眉をひそめて、あなたを暗く笑うように見つめた。「試してみては。でも、魂を皇帝に捧げなければ、体は適応しないかもしれない。そして、それはあなたにとって本当に悪いことになるだろう」
languages.original_text:
{n}The colonel raises an eyebrow in surprise and looks at you with dark amusement.{/n}
"You can try. But if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt. And then things will be really bad for you."

traits.locale_text: 大佐は眉をひそめて、あなたを暗く笑うように見つめた。「試してみては。でも、魂を皇帝に捧げなければ、体は適応しないかもしれない。そして、それはあなたにとって本当に悪いことになるだろう。」

languages.text: {n}Le colonel hausse un sourcil et vous lance un regard rempli d'un amusement macabre.{/n} « Pour notre part, nous nous y préparons très tôt, lorsque nous faisons nos classes, mais vous pouvez toujours essayer l'extrait de putréfaction. Attention, toutefois, vous allez passer un sale quart d'heure. Même si vous offrez votre âme à l'Empereur-Dieu, votre corps risque de ne pas s'adapter correctement. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel hausse un sourcil et vous lance un regard rempli d'un amusement macabre.{/n} « Pour notre part, nous nous y préparons très tôt, lorsque nous faisons nos classes, mais vous pouvez toujours essayer l'extrait de putréfaction. Attention, toutefois, vous allez passer un sale quart d'heure. Même si vous offrez votre âme à l'Empereur-Dieu, votre corps risque de ne pas s'adapter correctement. »

languages.text: {n}Albay, tek kaşını kaldırıp kasvetli bir keyifle sana bakıyor.{/n} "Biz daha acemiyken hazır ediliriz. Siz çürük özütünü deneyebilirsiniz fakat gerçekten iğrenç olacaktır. Ruhunuzu Tanrı İmparator'a teslim etmeseniz bile vücudunuz uyum sağlayamayabilir."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay, tek kaşını kaldırıp kasvetli bir keyifle sana bakıyor.{/n} "Biz daha acemiyken hazır ediliriz. Siz çürük özütünü deneyebilirsiniz fakat gerçekten iğrenç olacaktır. Ruhunuzu Tanrı İmparator'a teslim etmeseniz bile vücudunuz uyum sağlayamayabilir."

languages.text: {n}El coronel levanta una ceja y te mira con una siniestra expresión divertida.{/n} «Nos preparamos siendo aún reclutas, pero puede probar el extracto de carroña. Eso sí, es un brebaje nauseabundo. Incluso aunque encomiende su alma al Dios Emperador, es posible que su cuerpo no consiga adaptarse».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel levanta una ceja y te mira con una siniestra expresión divertida.{/n} «Nos preparamos siendo aún reclutas, pero puede probar el extracto de carroña. Eso sí, es un brebaje nauseabundo. Incluso aunque encomiende su alma al Dios Emperador, es posible que su cuerpo no consiga adaptarse».

languages.text: {n}上校挑了挑眉，带着一丝冷酷的玩味看着你。{/n}“我们从入伍时就开始准备了，但您可以试试腐化提取液。不过那玩意儿可恶心得很。就算您不把灵魂献给神皇，您的身体也未必能适应。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校挑了挑眉，带着一丝冷酷的玩味看着你。{/n}“我们从入伍时就开始准备了，但您可以试试腐化提取液。不过那玩意儿可恶心得很。就算您不把灵魂献给神皇，您的身体也未必能适应。”

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel hebt eine Augenbraue und sieht dich mit grimmiger Belustigung an.{/n} "Wir bereiten uns schon als Rekruten darauf vor, aber Ihr könnt den Wurzelextrakt gerne kosten. Er ist aber wirklich übel. Selbst wenn Ihr Eure Seele nicht dem Gottimperator übergebt, passt sich Euer Körper möglicherweise nicht an."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel raises an eyebrow and looks at you with grim amusement.{/n} "We prepare while we're still recruits, but you can try the rot extract. But it'll be really foul. Even if you don't give your soul to the God-Emperor, your body still might not adapt."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel hebt eine Augenbraue und sieht dich mit grimmiger Belustigung an.{/n} "Wir bereiten uns schon als Rekruten darauf vor, aber Ihr könnt den Wurzelextrakt gerne kosten. Er ist aber wirklich übel. Selbst wenn Ihr Eure Seele nicht dem Gottimperator übergebt, passt sich Euer Körper möglicherweise nicht an."
